title: LR-136
author: Psalm 47 (46):2
snippet: All people, clap your hands. Cry to God with shouts of joy!

title: Psalm 89
author: Psalm 89: 2-3, 16-17, 18-19
snippet: For ever I will sing the goodness of the Lord.

title: Peter 2:9
author: SP2026 - Sarah Hart
snippet: You are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation; announce the praises of him who called you out of darkness into his wonderful light.

title: A Place at Your Table
author: Ben Walther
snippet: Happy the ones whom you call here to dine, the saint and the sinner, your friends. Now reconciled in this banquet divine, the promise of life without end, the promise of life without end.

title: LR-137
author: Psalm 103 (102):1
snippet: Bless the Lord, O my soul, and all within me, his holy name.

title: Here at This Table
author: Janèt Sullivan Whitaker / Max Whitaker
snippet: Come and be filled here at this table. Food for all who hunger and drink for all who thirst. Drink of his love, wine of salvation. You shall live forever in Jesus Christ the Lord.

title: For the Sake of Christ
author: Ken Canedo
snippet: For the sake of Christ, I willingly accept my weakness and my trials, for when I am powerless, then I am strong.

title: Your Grace Is Enough
author: Matt Maher
snippet: Great is your faithfulness, O God; you wrestle with the sinner's restless heart. You lead us by still waters into mercy, and nothing can keep us apart. So remember your people, remember your children, remember your promise, O God.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
